purpose: binds the pushed session to journal fencing and inspect-first recovery

live_evidence.drift_note: the same remote may change after dry-run, so apply must refresh live evidence

required_proof: lease expiry stops stale apply replay

rejected_if: live drift appears after the dry-run receipt
the journal cannot prove a safe finish or rollback

blocked_when: fresh live hashes do not match the journaled target
the journal cannot prove a safe finish or rollback

required_invariants: preflight binds the push session to the stored pull base and live remote identity
dry-run eligibility never replaces apply-time live revalidation
claim generation and lease expiry fence stale workers before mutation
journal inspection is read-only and inspect must come before mutating recovery
live drift between dry-run and apply must be detected by fresh apply-time evidence
